mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_JEHU_SUGGESTION WHERE JEHU_REG_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) + INTERVAL '15' HOUR AND JEHU_REG_DT <= SYSDATE
SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'JehuSuggestionManager' AND DTL_CD = 'JehuPhone' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_JEHU_SUGGESTION WHERE JEHU_ANSWER_STAT = 'C' AND JEHU_ANSWER_DT <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NMCP_JEHU_SUGGESTION WHERE JEHU_ANSWER_STAT = 'C' AND JEHU_ANSWER_DT <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3))
